description: Golden fixture: session_open and session_close times for known fixed US market dates. Half-day close = 13:00 ET, regular close = 16:00 ET, regular open = 09:30 ET. All values derived from NYSE official schedule — NOT captured from any implementation.
derivation: NYSE early-close schedule. Half-days have official 13:00 ET close per NYSE rules. Sources: NYSE Holiday Schedule 2024/2025, pandas-market-calendars XNYS calendar. Regular days close at 16:00 ET, open at 09:30 ET regardless of EXECUTION_START_TIME.

cases.reason: Black Friday 2024 — NYSE early close at 13:00 ET (day after Thanksgiving)
Christmas Eve 2024 — NYSE early close at 13:00 ET
July 3, 2025 — NYSE early close at 13:00 ET (day before Independence Day)
Black Friday 2025 — NYSE early close at 13:00 ET (day after Thanksgiving)
Regular Wednesday — full trading day, close 16:00 ET
Regular Monday — full trading day, close 16:00 ET
Regular Monday before Christmas Eve — full trading day
